name_en: Flat-lay real shot, exclusive launch, Dongguan factory channel. The new model changed the large logo to a small logo, becoming even more understated. Can be carried by hand or on the shoulder. Love this briefcase shape. The color is B brand's classic caramel leather with white canvas, academic style with a retro vibe.
